parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ structuredQuery: { from: [{ collectionId: 'leads' }], where: { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: 'status' }, op: 'EQUAL', value: { stringValue: 'received' } } }, limit: 5 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const items=$input.all();function val(v){if(v==null)return null;if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'stringValue'))return v.stringValue;if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'integerValue'))return Number(v.integerValue);if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'doubleValue'))return v.doubleValue;if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'booleanValue'))return v.booleanValue;if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'mapValue'))return plain((v.mapValue||{}).fields);if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'arrayValue'))return ((v.arrayValue||{}).values||[]).map(val);if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(v,'timestampValue'))return v.timestampValue;return null;}function plain(f){const o={};for(const k in (f||{}))o[k]=val(f[k]);return o;}const out=[];for(const it of items){const arr=Array.isArray(it.json)?it.json:[it.json];for(const row of arr){if(!row||!row.document)continue;const id=String(row.document.name).split('/').pop();const lead=plain(row.document.fields);lead.id=id;const sys='Eres el Orquestador de calificacion de leads de PamaMotors (concesionario). Devuelve unicamente JSON valido.';const prompt='Califica este lead de 0 a 100 segun interes, presupuesto, plazo y completitud de datos. Lead: '+JSON.stringify({contact:lead.contact,intent:lead.intent,source:lead.source})+'. Indica los campos faltantes para poder cotizar, entre: vehicleOfInterest, newOrUsed, financing, budget. Si faltan, redacta UNA sola pregunta breve y cordial en espanol para pedirlos por WhatsApp. Responde en JSON con las claves: score (number 0-100), missing (array de strings), reply (string, vacio si no falta nada), nextStatus (qualified si no falta nada; awaiting_customer si falta algo).';const geminiBody={contents:[{role:'user',parts:[{text:prompt}]}],systemInstruction:{parts:[{text:sys}]},generationConfig:{temperature:0.3,responseMimeType:'application/json'}};out.push({json:{id:id,lead:lead,geminiBody:geminiBody}});}}return out;

const resp=$json;let text='';try{text=resp.candidates[0].content.parts.map(function(p){return p.text||'';}).join('');}catch(e){text='';}let d={};try{d=JSON.parse(text);}catch(e){d={};}const prep=$('Preparar leads').item.json;const lead=prep.lead||{};const id=prep.id;const score=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Number(d.score)||0));const missing=Array.isArray(d.missing)?d.missing:[];const nextStatus=d.nextStatus||(missing.length?'awaiting_customer':'qualified');const reply=d.reply||'';const fields={status:{stringValue:nextStatus},score:{integerValue:String(score)}};if(reply)fields.lastAgentReply={stringValue:reply};const phone=((lead.contact||{}).phone)||'';return {json:{id:id,phone:phone,reply:reply,nextStatus:nextStatus,score:score,firestore:{fields:fields},sendWa:!!(reply&&phone)}};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.reply } }) }}
